column1: これが奇跡でなくてなんだろう。
column2: これがきせきでなくてなんだろう。
column3: If this is not a miracle, then what is it?
column4: でなくてなんだろう (if ~ is not ~, then what is it? — emphatic identification)
column5: Noun + でなくてなんだろう
column6: rhetorical question asserting that something is the perfect embodiment of the named quality; 'what else could you call this but X?'
column8: でなくてなんだろう = emphatic rhetorical identification; にほかならない = nothing other than (assertive); と言うほかない = can only be called; まさに = precisely/truly
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:でなくてなんだろう source:authored scaffold:pending-audio
